summary: The synthesis-boundary lane is acceptable for this lifecycle repair. The candidate does not create synthesis groups, pool endpoints, or promote evidence conclusions; it preserves that the broad senolytics coverage-repair candidate remains in needs_revision because track-level evidence-map boundaries and endpoint compatibility gaps are still unresolved there.

findings.claim_or_issue: The repaired summary for senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21 explicitly keeps synthesis-boundary gaps among the reasons that broad candidate remains in needs_revision.
findings.why_it_matters: Accepting this review lane should not be misread as clearing the underlying broad senolytics coverage slice for synthesis or promotion.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the underlying senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21 synthesis-boundary review finding open until narrower endpoint-compatibility and synthesis-group repair work closes it.

findings.claim_or_issue: The candidate-revision repair proposes only candidate_change record creation and a lifecycle/summary update; it does not create, update, accept, or release any outcome, result, finding, or synthesis_group record.
findings.why_it_matters: The synthesis-boundary review lane can be complete for this lifecycle repair without independently rechecking endpoint-level poolability because no synthesis evidence record is changed by this candidate.
findings.recommended_action: Limit this acceptance to the lifecycle repair scope and require separate synthesis-boundary supervisor review for any future endpoint-compatibility or synthesis-group candidate.

findings.claim_or_issue: The target repair frames the broad senolytics coverage candidate as needing revision rather than as a synthesis-ready or promotion-ready evidence body.
findings.why_it_matters: The original broad slice mixes preclinical, registry, biomarker, safety, and pilot human evidence, so lifecycle repair must not imply that those data are compatible for formal pooling.
findings.recommended_action: Keep senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21 out of promotion and release until the open major synthesis-boundary finding on that candidate is resolved.
